ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "o_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "o_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "o_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "c_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "p_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "o_profit" TEXT /* Profit made from the order */,
  "o_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "o_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  "o_discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "o_shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost of the order */,
  "o_tax" TEXT /* Tax applied to the order */,
  "o_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("o_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_p_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_id") REFERENCES products ("p_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_c_id FOREIGN KEY ("c_id") REFERENCES customers ("c_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_o_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "c_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "c_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "c_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "c_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "c_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "c_join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "c_last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "c_total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "c_loyalty_level" TEXT /* Loyalty level of the customer (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("c_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "p_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "p_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "p_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "p_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "p_cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the product */,
  "p_stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "p_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "p_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product supplier */,
  "p_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("pc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_supplier_id") REFERENCES product_suppliers ("ps_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "pc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "pc_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "pc_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "pc_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "pc_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product supplier */,
  "ps_name" TEXT /* Name of the product supplier */,
  "ps_address" TEXT /* Address of the product supplier */,
  "ps_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the product supplier */,
  "ps_email" TEXT /* Email address of the product supplier */,
  "ps_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "ps_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "ps_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "os_description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  "os_color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation (e.g., red, green, yellow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "pay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "o_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "pay_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "pay_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "pay_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "pay_transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_o_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_id") REFERENCES orders ("o_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "p_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "inv_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "inv_reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "inv_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_p_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_id") REFERENCES products ("p_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "p_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "c_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "pr_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "pr_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "pr_review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "pr_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "pr_unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_p_id FOREIGN KEY ("p_id") REFERENCES products ("p_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_c_id FOREIGN KEY ("c_id") REFERENCES customers ("c_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, supplier) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "ol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order log entry */,
  "o_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being modified */,
  "ol_date" TEXT /* Date the modification was made */,
  "ol_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "ol_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "ol_old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "ol_new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "ol_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_ol_user FOREIGN KEY ("ol_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_o_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_id") REFERENCES orders ("o_id")
)
